# Explore Agent Pattern (ADHD-friendly)

I want to understand {{PATTERN}} across frameworks. Keep explanations concise.

1) Core concept: 1-2 bullets
2) Week 1-2 sample snippet (high-level, code not heavy)
3) How Week 3-4 handles it (short summary)
4) One simple code snippet to try

Focus on 'why' rather than syntax. Use course context lightly.
